data.description: Main dataset containing 10,000 synthetic Pakistan school-level records from 2022 to 2025. Covers 7 provinces, 50+ districts, 9 school types, and 34 features including enrollment, pass/dropout rates, teacher quality, infrastructure facilities, budget, and geographic data.
data.name: pakistan_education_system.csv

columns.name: school_id
columns.description: Unique school identifier in format PKS000001 to PKS010000.

columns.name: year
columns.description: Year of the school record or survey. Values: 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025.

columns.name: province
columns.description: Province or territory where the school is located. Values: Punjab, Sindh, KPK, Balochistan, Islamabad (ICT), Gilgit-Baltistan, AJK.

columns.name: district
columns.description: District within the province. Covers 50+ districts across Pakistan including Lahore, Karachi, Peshawar, Quetta, Islamabad, and more.

columns.name: area_type
columns.description: Geographic classification of the school location. Values: Urban, Semi-Urban, Rural, Remote.

columns.name: school_type
columns.description: Type of school. Values: Government Primary, Government Secondary, Government Higher Secondary, Private Primary, Private Secondary, Private Higher Secondary, Madrasah, Special Education, Technical/Vocational.

columns.name: school_ownership
columns.description: Entity responsible for running the school. Values: Government, Private, NGO/Trust, Community Based.

columns.name: medium_of_instruction
columns.description: Primary language used for teaching. Values: Urdu, English, Sindhi, Pashto, Bilingual (Urdu/English).

columns.name: shift
columns.description: School operating shift. Values: Morning, Evening, Full Day.

columns.name: grade_level
columns.description: Grade level being reported in this record. Values: Grade 1 through Grade 12.

columns.name: gender_served
columns.description: Gender of students enrolled at the school. Values: Male, Female.

columns.name: total_enrollment
columns.description: Total number of students enrolled at the school. Range: 20 to 3000.

columns.name: female_enrollment_ratio
columns.description: Proportion of enrolled students who are female. Range: 0.05 to 0.95. Lower in remote areas.

columns.name: total_teachers
columns.description: Total number of teachers working at the school. Range: 1 to 120.

columns.name: qualified_teachers_pct
columns.description: Percentage of teachers who hold a formal teaching qualification or degree. Range: 40 to 100.

columns.name: student_teacher_ratio
columns.description: Average number of students per teacher. Higher ratios indicate overcrowding.

columns.name: teacher_training_received
columns.description: Whether teachers received in-service professional training. Values: Yes, No, Partial.

columns.name: pass_rate_pct
columns.description: Percentage of students who passed their annual exams. Range: 20 to 99. Influenced by area type, ownership, and medium.

columns.name: dropout_rate_pct
columns.description: Percentage of enrolled students who dropped out during the year. Range: 0.5 to 55. Higher in remote and rural areas especially for females.

columns.name: matric_avg_score
columns.description: Average matric examination score out of 100. Only populated for Grade 9 and Grade 10 records. Null for all other grades.

columns.name: scholarship_available
columns.description: Whether the school offers any scholarship program to students. Values: Yes, No.

columns.name: monthly_fee_pkr
columns.description: Monthly tuition fee charged in Pakistani Rupees. Zero for government schools. Range: 0 to several thousand PKR for private schools.

columns.name: annual_budget_pkr
columns.description: Annual operating budget of the school in Pakistani Rupees. Follows log-normal distribution. Range: 50,000 to 50,000,000 PKR.

columns.name: infrastructure_score
columns.description: Composite infrastructure quality score computed from 8 facility indicators. Range: 0.0 (no facilities) to 8.0 (all facilities present).

columns.name: has_electricity
columns.description: Electricity availability at the school. Values: Yes, No, Partial.

columns.name: has_clean_water
columns.description: Whether clean drinking water is available at the school. Values: Yes, No.

columns.name: has_toilets
columns.description: Toilet facility status at the school. Values: Yes - Separate (male/female), Yes - Combined, No.

columns.name: has_library
columns.description: Whether the school has a functional library. Values: Yes, No.

columns.name: has_computer_lab
columns.description: Whether the school has a computer laboratory. Values: Yes, No.

columns.name: has_playground
columns.description: Whether the school has a playground or sports area. Values: Yes, No.

columns.name: has_boundary_wall
columns.description: Boundary wall status of the school premises. Values: Yes, No, Partial.

columns.name: has_internet
columns.description: Whether the school has internet connectivity. Values: Yes, No.

columns.name: building_condition
columns.description: Physical condition of the school building. Values: Excellent, Good, Fair, Poor, Very Poor.

columns.name: distance_from_city_km
columns.description: Distance from the nearest major city in kilometers. Range: 0.5 to 200 km. Higher values indicate more remote schools.

data.description: Full dataset documentation including schema, methodology, research questions, use cases, citation, and author information.
data.name: README.md
